subcodes.first_line: O illustrious prince! The omnipotent Lord - Who is both aware and witness - knoweth full well that during the bright nights and dark [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الامیر الشهیر رب قدیر واقف و شهید است که همواره در شبهای روشن و تار وقت
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
